response.global_summary: The video features an introductory segment of a Hololive concert, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'きゅるるん大作戦' (Kyururun Daisakusen) by Houshou Marine, and concludes with a transition segment. The song lyrics were not available in the public search results at this time.

scenes.description: The performer speaks to the audience, covering concert announcements, safety rules, and the event hashtag. No vocal music is playing.
The performance of the song 'きゅるるん大作戦' (Kyururun Daisakusen) takes place, with the audience waving lightsticks. The song title is displayed on a fan's screen at 03:23 and 04:35.
The vocal music fades out as the concert transition continues.
